name: Kakao i Translation
description: Kakao i Translation API — neural MT engine for Korean, English, Japanese, Chinese and more.

seo.title: Kakao i Translation — Localization / Translation API
seo.meta_description: Kakao i Translation: Kakao i Translation API — neural MT engine for Korean, English, Japanese, Chinese and more.

when_to_use: Korean-English neural MT for business document translation
Real-time chat translation for Korean-Japanese communication
Japanese and Chinese language pair support for APAC apps
Translation API embedded in Korean enterprise software
Localization pipeline for Korean-first product expansion

pros: Simple REST API with straightforward auth
Competitive per-character pricing for Asian pairs
cons: Console and docs heavily Korean-first, English gaps
Narrow language coverage vs Google or DeepL
Quota and rate limits tighter than hyperscalers
review.verdict: Best when Korean is the source or target; outside that niche, broader engines beat it on features and language count.
review.best_for: Korean-facing products translating to or from JA, ZH, EN at scale
review.not_for: Teams needing 50+ languages, glossaries, or English-language support
